summary: Completed testing of Documentations page refactoring. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly - Admin-only 'Modèles de formulaires' button, FormTemplatesPage with system templates, PoleDetails with tree structure (Documents, Bons de travail, Autorisations particulières), chevrons for expand/collapse, search filter, and form type selection dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/documentations/form-templates correctly returns default system templates (BON_TRAVAIL, AUTORISATION) on first call
Backend correctly prevents deletion and modification of system templates (is_system: true)
Backend /api/documentations/poles returns poles with embedded documents and bons_travail arrays
Frontend Documentations.jsx correctly shows 'Modèles de formulaires' button only for admin users (isAdmin() check)
Frontend FormTemplatesPage.jsx correctly displays templates grouped by type with 'Système' badge for system templates
Frontend PoleDetails.jsx correctly implements tree structure with 3 sections: Documents, Bons de travail, Autorisations particulières
Frontend PoleDetails.jsx correctly shows chevrons for expand/collapse functionality
Frontend PoleDetails.jsx correctly shows '+ Ajouter document' and '+ Ajouter formulaire' buttons
Frontend form type selection dialog correctly shows dropdown with 'Bon de travail' and 'Autorisation particulière' options
Frontend search filter correctly filters documents and formulaires by name
Frontend correctly shows Edit icon only for bons de travail (not documents), Printer and Delete icons for all items
seed_data_creation: Used existing Maintenance pole (id: e2e1974a-cfde-447c-ae69-39d611e874d6) with 2 documents and 1 bon de travail
context_for_next_testing_agent: Documentations page refactoring fully tested. Key features verified: 1) 'Modèles de formulaires' button visible only for admin users, 2) FormTemplatesPage at /documentations/modeles shows system templates with 'Système' badge, 3) PoleDetails page shows tree structure with Documents, Bons de travail, Autorisations particulières sections, 4) Chevrons work for expand/collapse, 5) Search filter works correctly, 6) '+ Ajouter formulaire' dialog shows dropdown with Bon de travail and Autorisation particulière options, 7) Edit icon shown only for bons de travail (permission-based), Printer and Delete icons shown for all items.

admin_modeles_button.test: Verify 'Modèles de formulaires' button visible only for admin
admin_modeles_button.evidence: Screenshot shows button visible for admin user. Code check: isAdmin() function in Documentations.jsx

form_templates_page.evidence: Screenshot shows page with 'Bon de travail' and 'Autorisation particulière' sections, each with 1 modèle(s) badge

system_templates_badge.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Système' badge on both default templates

pole_details_tree_structure.test: Verify PoleDetails shows tree with Documents, Bons de travail, Autorisations particulières
pole_details_tree_structure.evidence: Screenshot shows 3 sections with correct icons and counts

chevrons_expand_collapse.evidence: Screenshots show sections expanded with chevron-down icons, collapsed with chevron-right

add_document_button.evidence: Screenshot shows outline-style button in header

add_formulaire_button.evidence: Screenshot shows blue button in header

form_type_dialog.test: Verify form type selection dialog with dropdown
form_type_dialog.evidence: Screenshot shows dialog with 'Type de formulaire' dropdown containing 'Bon de travail' and 'Autorisation particulière' options

form_type_description.test: Verify description appears when form type selected
form_type_description.evidence: Screenshot shows description 'Formulaire pour documenter les travaux de maintenance réalisés par une entreprise externe' after selecting Bon de travail

search_filter.evidence: Screenshot shows search term 'datasheet' filtering to show only 1 document

edit_print_icons.test: Verify Edit (for bons) and Print icons on items
edit_print_icons.evidence: Screenshot shows Edit icon on bon de travail, Printer icons on all items

api_form_templates.evidence: Backend test passed - returns 2 default templates with correct structure

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/documentations_page.png - Main Documentations page with 'Modèles de formulaires' button
.screenshots/form_type_selected.png - Bon de travail selected with description
